title: Vera Bradley Stock Price and Overview
text: Vera Bradley Inc. is a Fort Wayne, Indiana-based designer of women's handbags, luggage and other travel items, fashion and home accessories, and unique gifts. In August 2023, the company announced second quarter fiscal year 2024 results with consolidated net revenues totaling $128.2 million and net income of $9.3 million or $0.30 per diluted share. The company reported meaningful year-over-year improvement in second quarter earnings, driven by significant gross margin expansion and successful expense reduction efforts. As of April 29, 2026, the stock price was $4.05. Over the past 52 weeks, Vera Bradley has traded between $1.39 and $4.39. The company was focused on Project Restoration, which concentrates on four key pillars of the business for each brand: Consumer, Brand, Product, and Channel.
